query:
-- Miguel Flores: LA area
UPDATE saved_leads SET assignedAgent = 'Miguel Flores'
WHERE (address LIKE '%Los Angeles%' OR address LIKE '%Glendale%' OR address LIKE '%Santa Clarita%' OR address LIKE '%Anaheim%' OR address LIKE '%Santa Ana%' OR address LIKE '%Irvine%' OR address LIKE '%Huntington Beach%' OR address LIKE '%Garden Grove%' OR address LIKE '%Oceanside%')
AND assignedAgent IS NULL;

-- Youssef El Karmi: NorCal + Central Valley
UPDATE saved_leads SET assignedAgent = 'Youssef El Karmi'
WHERE (address LIKE '%San Francisco%' OR address LIKE '%San Jose%' OR address LIKE '%Oakland%' OR address LIKE '%Fresno%' OR address LIKE '%Sacramento%' OR address LIKE '%Bakersfield%' OR address LIKE '%Stockton%' OR address LIKE '%Modesto%' OR address LIKE '%San Bernardino%' OR address LIKE '%Riverside%')
AND assignedAgent IS NULL;

-- Rupert Musni: San Diego area
UPDATE saved_leads SET assignedAgent = 'Rupert Musni'
WHERE (address LIKE '%San Diego%' OR address LIKE '%Chula Vista%' OR address LIKE '%Escondido%' OR address LIKE '%El Cajon%' OR address LIKE '%Carlsbad%' OR address LIKE '%Vista%' OR address LIKE '%San Marcos%' OR address LIKE '%Encinitas%' OR address LIKE '%National City%' OR address LIKE '%La Mesa%')
AND assignedAgent IS NULL;

-- David Carrillo: South Bay / SGV
UPDATE saved_leads SET assignedAgent = 'David Carrillo'
WHERE (address LIKE '%Long Beach%' OR address LIKE '%Torrance%' OR address LIKE '%Pasadena%' OR address LIKE '%Pomona%' OR address LIKE '%El Monte%' OR address LIKE '%Downey%' OR address LIKE '%Inglewood%' OR address LIKE '%West Covina%' OR address LIKE '%Norwalk%' OR address LIKE '%Burbank%')
AND assignedAgent IS NULL;

-- Assign remaining unassigned leads to Miguel (LA area default)
UPDATE saved_leads SET assignedAgent = 'Miguel Flores'
WHERE assignedAgent IS NULL;
